text.title: Drift Classification Taxonomy Procedure
text.summary: 5-step procedure to apply the methodology end-to-end.

step.name: capture-drift-instance
step.action: For each diff line, create a drift_id + resource_address + detected_at row.

step.name: gather-evidence
step.action: Find the source of the change (who, when, via what tool). Attach to the row.
step.note: Gate: If evidence absent, class = unknown + escalate.

step.name: classify-and-route
step.action: Pick class from closed set. Pick fix_action per class. Assign owner.

step.name: execute-fix-action
step.action: Revert / backport / provider_bump / boundary_review / triage. Open PRs as needed.

step.name: weekly-triage-and-report
step.action: Triage new + age out stale. Report weekly to engineering leader.
